checks.description: After a 0→1 transition on input a, the rise output must become 1 within a bounded number of clock cycles and then return to 0 before the next edge.
checks.pass_condition: rise is asserted for at most one cycle within 2 cycles after the input transition and deasserted thereafter.
checks.trigger_condition: When a rising edge on a is detected.

checks.description: After a 1→0 transition on input a, the down output must become 1 within a bounded number of clock cycles and then return to 0 before the next edge.
checks.pass_condition: down is asserted for at most one cycle within 2 cycles after the input transition and deasserted thereafter.
checks.trigger_condition: When a falling edge on a is detected.

checks.description: Require that rise and down outputs reflect input edges within a conservative bounded latency.
checks.pass_condition: For each detected edge on a, the corresponding output is asserted within 2 cycles and deasserted before the next edge.
checks.trigger_condition: When the plan applies a legal input transition on a.
